subject: docs(pdf): update user-facing docs, fix code inconsistencies
body:
- USER_GUIDE.md: add "Saving as PDF" section with step-by-step
  instructions and what the PDF includes
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: add regression checklist item, dedicated test
  scenario (1.6) with dark mode verification, renumber subsequent
  sections, update actions menu expectation
- README.md: add "Save as PDF" to features list
- TransactionTable: fix empty state checks to use displayRows instead
  of paginatedRows for consistency with the v-for data source
- Remove unused print-show-flex CSS utility (was speculative)

Tags: docs, pdf, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: download-pdf
Semver: patch
